heading: Annual accounting; special contingency reserve
label: 8712 Annual accounting; special contingency reserve
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 2097(d), .Aug. 17, 1954, ch. 752, § 8(d)68 Stat. 741The words “A policy purchased under this chapter” are substituted for “Each such policy” for clarity. The word “insurance”, preceding the word “company”, is omitted as unnecessary; and the word “company” is substituted for “company or companies” on authority of .1 U.S.C. 1The words “Employees’ Life Insurance Fund” are substituted for “fund”.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
Amendments1978— substituted “Office of Personnel Management” and “Office” for “Civil Service Commission” and “Commission”, respectively.Pub. L. 95–454
Effective Date of 1978 AmendmentAmendment by effective 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–454section 907 of Pub. L. 95–454section 1101 of this titleOct. 13, 1978

children.text: the amounts of premiums actually accrued under the policy from its date of issue to the end of the policy year;
the total of all mortality and other claim charges incurred for that period; and
the amounts of the insurers’ expense and risk charges for that period.
